name: Shrimp in Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell, devein, and rinse the shrimp. Sprinkle with salt and let sit for 10 minutes.
2. Remove seeds from the chili peppers and crumble into small bits. Set aside.
3. Combine the oils in a bowl.
4. In four shallow ovenproof baking dishes, divide the shrimp, chili pepper pieces, and oil.
5. Place in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the shrimp turn pink. Toss the shrimp once or twice during baking.
6. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with paprika and chopped parsley.
7. Serve immediately with fresh country bread to soak up the oil.
